params.defaultPlatformFeeBps_: Default platform fee in basis points

returns._0: wallet The wallet address (address(0) if not deployed)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newFeeBps: The new fee in basis points

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

constructor.notice: Initialize the factory and deploy implementation

deployWalletFor(address).notice: Manually deploy a wallet for a streamer (admin only)

donateToStream(address,string).notice: Send a donation to a streamer (creates wallet if needed)

getWallet(address).notice: Get the wallet address for a streamer

hasWallet(address).notice: Check if a streamer has a wallet

subscribeToStream(address,uint256).notice: Subscribe to a streamer (creates wallet if needed)
